claim_boundary: this report is a benchmark-bound planner-learning surface over explicit receipt bundles, validator outcomes, and accepted-outcome labels. It does not collapse planner quality into authority closure
summary: Receipt-supervision report keeps route_quality 2000->10000 bps, refusal_quality 8000->10000, and accepted_outcome_quality 4000->10000 bps explicit across 2 accepted / 1 evidence rejections / 1 refusal-quality rejections / 1 delegated accepts.
